terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Migozz, the first social ecosystem powered by artificial intelligence. By accessing or using our services, you agree to comply with the following Terms of Service.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of the Terms
section1.content: By registering, accessing, or using Migozz, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must stop using the platform.

section2.title: 2. Description of the Service
section2.content:
Migozz allows users to connect multiple social media accounts, publish content, analyze statistics, receive gifts, enhance their digital presence, access monetization tools, and interact with AI-powered features.

The Migozz AI Assistant may process text and images to generate personalized recommendations, analysis, and content.

section3.title: 3. Eligibility
section3.content:
You must be at least 13 years old to use Migozz.
If you are a minor, parental or guardian consent is required.

section4.title: 4. Acceptable Use
section4.content:
You may not use Migozz to:

● Post illegal, offensive, or infringing content.
● Impersonate others or manipulate statistics.
● Upload violent, explicit, or inappropriate content.
● Engage in fraudulent or deceptive activities.
● Use unauthorized automation tools.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
section5.content:
All content developed by Migozz, including algorithms, designs, features, and AI tools, is owned by Migozz Inc.

Users retain ownership of the content they upload, but grant Migozz a limited license to display and process it within the platform.

section6.title: 6. Monetization and Payments
section6.content:
Revenue generated from gifts, monetization tools, or promotional features is subject to fees defined by Migozz.
Payments are processed securely and may be subject to local taxes.

section7.title: 7. AI-Generated Content
section7.content:
Content generated using artificial intelligence:

● May contain inaccuracies or misinterpretations.
● Should not be considered professional advice.
● May use information provided by the user (text or images).

Users acknowledge that Migozz is not responsible for decisions made based on AI-generated outputs.

section8.title: 8. Account Security and Suspension
section8.content:
We may suspend or terminate accounts that:

● Violate these Terms
● Engage in suspicious or abusive activity
● Attempt to compromise the platform’s security

section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
section9.content:
Migozz is not responsible for:

● Failures arising from third-party services (Firebase, Google Cloud, AI services)
● Data loss not caused by our systems
● Improper use of the platform by the user
● Errors or outputs generated by AI

section10.title: 10. Modifications to the Service
section10.content: Migozz may update or modify functionalities at any time to improve the user experience or comply with regulations.

section11.title: 11. Governing Law
section11.content: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in the developer’s jurisdiction.

section12.title: 12. Contact
section12.content:
For questions regarding these Terms:

Email: migozzoficial@gmail.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Migozz, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your information.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content:
1.1 Registration Information

● Name
● Email address
● Phone number (if applicable)
● Connected social media accounts
● Optional information such as gender (NOT required)

1.2 Uploaded Content

● Photos or images taken with the camera or uploaded from your device
● Text submitted to the AI Assistant
● User preferences and profile settings

1.3 Usage Data

● Platform activity
● Interactions and engagement metrics
● Session duration
● Monetization and gift-related data

1.4 Technical Information

● Device model
● Operating system
● Firebase identifiers
● IP address

1.5 Device Permissions

Camera: To allow you to take photos and generate personalized AI content.
Photo Library: To upload images for profile or AI features.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content:
We use your information to:

● Personalize your experience and AI interactions
● Display community statistics
● Facilitate cross-platform posting and content management
● Process monetization and gifts
● Generate AI-based analysis and recommendations
● Provide technical support
● Ensure security and prevent fraud

section3.title: 3. AI Processing and Image Handling
section3.content:
When using AI features:

● Your text or images may be processed by AI models to provide results
● Only the data necessary for the requested function is used
● Your images are NOT used to train external models

section4.title: 4. Information Sharing
section4.content:
We do not sell your information.

We may share data ONLY with:

● Technology partners such as Firebase, Google Cloud, and AI service providers
● Legal authorities if required by law
● Strategic partners, only with your explicit consent

section5.title: 5. Security
section5.content:
We use encryption, authentication, and secure servers to protect your information.
However, no system is completely immune to potential risks.

section6.title: 6. Data Retention and Deletion
section6.content:
We store your data while your account remains active.

You may request:
● Account deletion
● Removal of your personal data
● Correction of inaccurate information

To do so, contact: migozzoficial@gmail.com

After deletion, your data cannot be recovered.

section7.title: 7. Children’s Privacy
section7.content:
Migozz is not intended for children under 13.
We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

section8.title: 8. Policy Updates
section8.content:
We may update this Privacy Policy.
Significant changes will be notified within the app.

section9.title: 9. Contact
section9.content:
If you have any questions regarding this Policy or wish to exercise your rights:

Email: migozzoficial@gmail.com

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
dataDeletion.intro: If you want to delete your personal data from Migozz, follow the instructions below.

section1.title: 1. Scope
section1.content: These instructions apply to the information collected by Migozz through Facebook Login and other Meta integrations, including: public name, user ID, profile picture, email (if authorized), and any additional permissions you granted to the app.

section3.title: 3. What happens next
section3.content:
• We will confirm receipt within 48–72 hours.
• We will complete deletion or anonymization within a maximum of 30 days.
• You will receive a confirmation once the process is finished.

section4.title: 4. Deletion scope
section4.content:
We delete data obtained through Facebook Login and data generated during your use of Migozz (profiles, sessions, preferences, content not subject to legal obligations).

Certain minimal records may be retained temporarily for:
• Legal compliance
• Fraud/abuse prevention
• Accounting/tax obligations
• Defense against claims

These records are securely stored and deleted once the obligation expires.

option1.title: From your account
option1.description: Go to Profile > Settings > Privacy > Delete my account and data, or visit https://migozz.com/account/delete and follow the on-screen steps.

option2.title: Web form
option2.description: Fill out the form at https://migozz.com/legal/data-deletion providing your email and the ID you used to register (if you know it).

option3.title: Email request
option3.description: Write to privacy@migozz.com with the subject "Delete my data – Migozz" using the same email linked to your account.

warning.title: ⚠️ Effects
warning.content: Deletion is irreversible and may result in deactivation or closure of your account and loss of access to your content or related features.

welcome.title: Welcome to Migozz
welcome.description: Discover your new social ecosystem. We'll guide you through the main features so you can make the most of your experience.

home.title: Home
home.description: Access your main screen and reload your profile information anytime.

search.title: Discover
search.description: Search for other users within the app and expand your network.

messages.title: Stay Connected
messages.description: Access your messages and conversations with other users within the app.

stats.title: Track Your Networks
stats.description: View statistics from your social networks and see your followers list within the app by tapping the app icon.

settings.title: Edit Your Profile
settings.description: Edit your basic information and manage your account settings.

linkedNetworks.title: Your Own Ecosystem
linkedNetworks.description: Other users can view and access your linked networks by tapping the icons or photos of each one.

shareQr.title: Share
shareQr.description: Share your unique QR code with others by downloading the image or sending it through various social networks.

community.title: Your Followers
community.description: View the total followers across all your linked networks in 'Community'. Tap to see your followers within the app.

messagesHeader.title: Stay Connected
messagesHeader.description: Quickly access your messages and start conversations with other users.

nameSection.title: Introduce Yourself
nameSection.description: Other users can see your full name, username, and listen to your audio introduction.

notifications.title: Your Notifications
notifications.description: Access notifications for followers and messages. The badge shows the number of pending notifications.

qrScanner.title: Connect
qrScanner.description: Scan other users' QR codes anytime to connect with them instantly.

editProfile.title: Customize Your Profile
editProfile.description: Customize more aspects of your profile by adding, editing, or removing information and social networks from your ecosystem.

help.title: Need Help?
help.confirmMessage: Do you want to see the tutorial again? This will guide you through the main features of the app.
